proposal_summary: Proposal by Michigan Blockchain to deploy and officially recognize Uniswap v3 on the Filecoin Virtual Machine (FVM) and utilize Axelar as the interchain governance executor.

disclosed_entities.name: Michigan Blockchain
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence:
Proposer: Michigan Blockchain
This entity is responsible for authoring the proposal & managing the governance process

disclosed_entities.name: Axelar
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence:
Deployer: Axelar
This entity is responsible for the technical deployment... Bridge Provider: Axelar

claimed_actions.raw_action: Recognize deployment as canonical and update ENS
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Includes the FVM deployment addresses into the canonical ENS registry.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The text record of the uniswap.eth ENS subdomain titled v3-deployments.uniswap.eth will be amended to include the reference to the stated v3 contracts on the FVM.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal primarily seeks canonical recognition and ENS updating for already deployed contracts.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The relevant Uniswap v3 contracts have also been deployed on the FVM. If this onchain vote passes, this deployment will be officially recognized as a canonical v3 deployment through an amendment to the v3deployments.uniswap.eth subdomain.

limitations: No specific smart contract execution details for the ENS update are included in the proposal text.
